live_mode.description: This field will be true if this object exists in the live environment or false if it exists in the test environment.

account_type.description: Can be checking, savings or other.

party_name.description: The legal name of the entity which owns the account.

party_address.description: The address associated with the owner or null.

account_details.description: An array of account detail objects.

account_capabilities.description: An array of AccountCapability objects that list the originating abilities of the internal account and any relevant information for them.

routing_details.description: An array of routing detail objects.

connection.description: Specifies which financial institution the accounts belong to.

metadata.description: Additional data represented as key-value pairs. Both the key and value must be strings.

parent_account_id.description: The parent InternalAccount of this account.

counterparty_id.description: The Counterparty associated to this account.

vendor_id.description: The vendor ID associated with this account.

legal_entity_id.description: The Legal Entity associated to this account.

ledger_account_id.description: If the internal account links to a ledger account in Modern Treasury, the id of the ledger account will be populated here.

contra_ledger_account_id.description: If the internal account links to a contra ledger account in Modern Treasury, the id of the contra ledger account will be populated here.

external_id.description: An optional user-defined 180 character unique identifier.
